'''''Star Wars Manga: A New Hope'' 4''' is the fourth volume in the ''[[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope]]'' series. It was illustrated by [[Hisao Tamaki]] and based upon the original story by [[George Lucas]]. The cover art is by [[Adam Warren]].
